full_text:
Q3 Infrastructure Review
Internal Engineering Update
HighlightsMigrated 60% of services to the new cluster
Reduced p95 latency by 18%
3 incidents resolved within SLA
Uptime by QuarterUptime trended upward across all three measured quarters
Next StepsComplete migration by Q4
Run load test in staging
Publish updated runbook
notes: One slide contains an embedded chart image (bar chart, no text alternative).
